testcase.name: TC-MAP-01: /map page loads with heading and stat bar

failure.message: mapping.spec.ts:127:1 TC-MAP-01: /map page loads with heading and stat bar

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › mapping.spec.ts:127:1 › TC-MAP-01: /map page loads with heading and stat bar ──────── Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed Locator: locator('p.text-sm.text-base-content\\/60').first() Expected: visible Received: hidden Timeout: 8000ms Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 8000ms - waiting for locator('p.text-sm.text-base-content\\/60').first() 12 × locator resolved to

@admin

- unexpected value "hidden" 127 | test('TC-MAP-01: /map page loads with heading and stat bar', async ({ page }) => { 128 | await expect(page.locator(SEL.pageHeading)).toBeVisible({ timeout: 8_000 }); > 129 | await expect(page.locator(SEL.statBar).first()).toBeVisible({ timeout: 8_000 }); | ^ 130 | }); 131 | 132 | // ============================================================================= at C:\Users\a.eraly\AdventureLog\frontend\qa\test-cases\e2e\mapping.spec.ts:129:51 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\reports\test-results\mapping-TC-MAP-01-map-page-loads-with-heading-and-stat-bar-chromium\test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\..\reports\test-results\mapping-TC-MAP-01-map-page-loads-with-heading-and-stat-bar-chromium\error-context.md

testcase.name: TC-MAP-02: map canvas is present and has non-zero dimensions
TC-MAP-03: no JavaScript errors are thrown during map page load
TC-MAP-04: Show Visited checkbox is present and toggleable
TC-MAP-05: Show Planned checkbox is present and toggleable
TC-MAP-06: Show Regions checkbox is present and toggleable
TC-MAP-07: typing in search input updates the stat bar pin count

failure.message: mapping.spec.ts:243:1 TC-MAP-07: typing in search input updates the stat bar pin count

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › mapping.spec.ts:243:1 › TC-MAP-07: typing in search input updates the stat bar pin count Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed Locator: locator('p.text-sm.text-base-content\\/60').first() Expected: visible Received: hidden Timeout: 6000ms Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 6000ms - waiting for locator('p.text-sm.text-base-content\\/60').first() 10 × locator resolved to

''; 248 | 249 | // Type a query that is very unlikely to match any real location name at C:\Users\a.eraly\AdventureLog\frontend\qa\test-cases\e2e\mapping.spec.ts:246:25 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\reports\test-results\mapping-TC-MAP-07-typing-i-a4b0b-ates-the-stat-bar-pin-count-chromium\test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\..\reports\test-results\mapping-TC-MAP-07-typing-i-a4b0b-ates-the-stat-bar-pin-count-chromium\error-context.md

testcase.name: TC-MAP-08: Add Location button opens dialog#my_modal_1
TC-MAP-09: canvas is present after navigating away and returning to /map
TC-MAP-10: clicking the Map link in the navbar navigates to /map

failure.message: mapping.spec.ts:325:1 TC-MAP-10: clicking the Map link in the navbar navigates to /map

testcase.failure: [chromium] › mapping.spec.ts:325:1 › TC-MAP-10: clicking the Map link in the navbar navigates to /map Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed Locator: locator('a[href="/map"]').first() Expected: visible Received: hidden Timeout: 6000ms Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 6000ms - waiting for locator('a[href="/map"]').first() 10 × locator resolved to … - unexpected value "hidden" 330 | // Click the Map link in the desktop navbar 331 | const mapLink = page.locator(SEL.navMap).first(); > 332 | await expect(mapLink).toBeVisible({ timeout: 6_000 }); | ^ 333 | await mapLink.click(); 334 | 335 | await page.waitForURL('**/map**', { timeout: 8_000 }); at C:\Users\a.eraly\AdventureLog\frontend\qa\test-cases\e2e\mapping.spec.ts:332:25 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\reports\test-results\mapping-TC-MAP-10-clicking-a61cf-the-navbar-navigates-to-map-chromium\test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\..\reports\test-results\mapping-TC-MAP-10-clicking-a61cf-the-navbar-navigates-to-map-chromium\error-context.md
